hero.description: I help businesses stop wasting their ad budget. I turn Google Ads and Meta campaigns into a real, measurable source of revenue – with clear reporting so you always know where your money is.

problem.headline: Most businesses are losing money on ads unnecessarily
problem.description: Poorly configured campaigns don't just burn your budget – they hold back your entire business. All it takes is knowing where and what to fix.
problem.card1Desc: You pay for clicks, but no orders follow. You don't know exactly which campaign works and which one just spends.
problem.card2Desc: You get tables full of numbers, but no answer to the most important question: am I making money from ads, or losing it?
problem.card3Title: No time to figure it out yourself
problem.card3Desc: The PPC landscape changes every month. Algorithms, new formats, bidding strategies – that's a full-time job.
problem.quote: Well-configured campaigns should work for you – not cost you money every month without a clear result.

guide.headline: I know how much it hurts to pay for ads
guide.p1: Since 2019, I've helped businesses across dozens of industries get the most out of their ad spend. 70+ projects have given me a precise instinct for what works and what only looks good on paper.
guide.p2: I don't just set up and manage campaigns – you always know exactly what's happening. Automated reporting in Looker Studio ensures you have real-time data, clearly and transparently.

plan.headline: Three simple steps to campaigns that earn
plan.description: No unnecessary complexity. You always know exactly what happens next.
plan.step1Desc: We review your current campaigns, identify where you're losing money and what's actually working. You get a clear overview of findings – no strings attached.
plan.step2Desc: Based on the consultation, I propose a strategy built specifically for your business and target audience. We set up campaigns, tracking and automated reporting in Looker Studio.
plan.step3Desc: I continuously optimize campaigns and you receive a clear monthly report. You always know how much you invested and what it brought.
plan.ctaNote: No commitment. Free of charge. I'll respond within 48 hours.

results.headline: What you gain – and what you risk by doing nothing
results.success1Desc: Clear ROI you can justify to anyone. Every ad crown has its result.
results.success2Desc: Clear dashboards in Looker Studio. You always know what's happening, in real time.
results.success3Desc: You know your ads are handled by someone with 6 years of experience and 70+ projects behind them.
results.fail1: Every month without optimization = thousands wasted
results.fail2: Competitors overtake you and take your customers
results.fail3: You don't know where you're losing money – and you keep losing it

homeCta.headline: Ready to start? Consultation is free.
homeCta.description: Write to me and I'll get back to you within 48 hours. We'll discuss your business and campaigns – no strings attached.

about.metaDesc: PPC specialist since 2019. Managing campaigns with a total budget of over 200 million CZK for 70+ clients.
about.headline: I'm František Stejskal, PPC Specialist
about.p1: Since 2019, I've been helping businesses get the most out of their ad budget. I've worked on more than 70 projects across various industries – from e-commerce to services to B2B.
about.p2: It's not enough for me to set up campaigns and let them run. I continuously optimize, test, and look for growth opportunities. Every client gets clear reporting so they always know what's happening with their investment.
about.timelineHeadline: How I got to where I am
about.t1Desc: I fully committed to PPC campaigns and started building a portfolio of first clients.
about.t2Desc: I added Facebook and Instagram campaign management to Google Ads and expanded services into UX and SEO.
about.t3Desc: I introduced automated reports in Looker Studio – clients have their results clearly displayed in real time.
about.t4Desc: I crossed the 200 million CZK milestone in managed ad spend across more than 70 projects.
about.v1Desc: You always know exactly where your money is and what it's bringing. No hidden costs or opaque reports.
about.v2Desc: A good-looking CTR isn't enough. I care whether campaigns bring real orders and revenue.
about.v3Desc: I don't want quick projects. I want clients I can grow with, optimize together, and achieve ever-better results.
about.ctaHeadline: Want to learn more about me?
about.ctaDesc: Write to me – I'd love to meet and talk through your campaigns.

services.metaDesc: Google Ads, Meta Ads, automated reporting in Looker Studio, UX consulting and SEO advisory.
services.headline: What I can do for you
services.description: I help businesses earn more from their ad budget. From campaign management to reporting to website optimization.
services.ctaDesc: We'll discuss your business and I'll recommend what makes the most sense for you. Consultation is free and no strings attached.

contact.metaDesc: Book a free consultation. Write to me and I'll get back to you within 48 hours.
contact.headline: Let's talk
contact.description: Write to me – I'd love to discuss your business, campaigns, and find where you have room to grow. Consultation is free and no strings attached. I'll reply within 48 hours.
contact.trust2: Consultation is free and no strings attached
